abort.zha_not_configured: Configure ZHA first, then add EasyIR.

error.unknown_ieee: Could not read Zigbee IEEE from this device. Pick another ZHA device.
error.invalid_profile: Pick a built-in profile or enter a valid custom file path.

user.title: EasyIR
user.description: Pick your ZHA IR device (picker prefers TS1201 models). Built-in profiles ship with EasyIR; custom path is optional.%optional_supported

data.profile_path: Custom profile path (only if you chose Custom path)

learn_once.name: Learn one IR code
learn_once.description: Enable learn mode for a configured IR hub and wait for one learned code.

hub_id.name: EasyIR hub
hub_id.description: Optional EasyIR hub config entry id. If set, learn runs via this hub-specific profile.

ieee.name: IEEE
ieee.description: Optional fallback when hub_id is not provided.

endpoint_id.name: Endpoint id
endpoint_id.description: Optional endpoint override. If omitted, endpoint from selected hub/default entry is used.

timeout_s.name: Timeout (seconds)
timeout_s.description: How long to wait for one code in learn mode.
